node.text: ‼️ No. 13 is actually New Era Shibuya Center Street Store — I mixed it up with a diff spot I went to for yakitori and mistyped it in the post
@nomsandeats u gotta come try mc spicy in Singapore omg

⬇️ 20 BEST BITES in Tokyo ranked 

Follow @messyfeedeats for more Japan MUST EAT roundup lists‼️

20. @mcdonaldsjapan
19. Kagetsudo
18. Senmonten Nanadaime Matabee
17. Tsukiji Yamacho
16. @asakusachaya_tabanenoshi
15. @tokyo.tarako 
14. Toritoh at Tsukiji Market
13. New Era Shibuya Center Street Store
12. @kagurazaka_saryo
11. @turretcoffee
10. Kurihara Tofu shop
9. @yamadanounagi
8. @shiopan_maison
7. Kyobashi Matsuwa
6. @nakayoshi_shibuya_stream
5. @idumo_sinjuku
4. @ramen_kamo_to_negi
3. @ramen_kakitokai
2. @tsujihan_maebashi
1. @glitch_coffee 

🛎️ Save this list for your next trip to Tokyo!

Added a few spots I didn’t post about bc I got lazy. I’m kinda surprised I put Tsujihan so high up there but it’s surprisingly great, especially the sea bream broth. It’s also very value for money so-

🆘 Follow @messyfeedeats for more Japan must-go spots!
